stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
The pilot is planning to land at an aerodrome located within a Control Zone (CTR). The Control Zone is located within the lateral limits of an Control Area (CTA). Which figure indicates the correct vertical limit of the CTR?

options.a: Figure 1: at the lower limit of the CTA or higher.
options.b: Figure 2: at 1500 ft above ground or water.
options.c: Figure 3: at least 500 ft below the lower limit of the CTA.
options.d: Figure 4: at a flight level defined at or above FL35.
